section_name: Acquisition of Property for Change, Relocation, or Abandonment of Railroad Line

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Subject to Subsection (b), a railroad company or a receiver of a railroad that changes, relocates, or abandons a line of railroad in this state may acquire by condemnation or otherwise land for:
any other purpose connected with or necessary to the building or operating of the line of railroad, as changed, relocated, or abandoned.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Property acquired under this section must be declared for and charged with public use.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.
